creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi, Martin! 

Thanks a lot for your report! Sorry for the delay with the answer, I was 
testing the fix on net/samba33. It was a small bug introduced in 
3.2.8/3.3.1 releases and is patched now in the port. So, please try 
brand new Samba 3.3.2 port and see, if it fixes your problem. 

You can also copy net/samba33/files/patch-lib__replace__libreplace_network.m4 
into samba32/files if you want to get the same fix for Samba3.2.8. In  
general, Samba team advices to switch to Samba 3.3 series. 

With best regards, 
Timur. 

P.S> I hate GNATS! Sorry for the flood :(
